sourceMovie.title: Widows
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Widows for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a thriller rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Steve McQueen keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The crime and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Bone Collector
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Widows clicked for you, The Bone Collector (1999) is a strong next stop: both trade in crime and thriller, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Widows?
faq.answer: Try The Bone Collector, The Outfit, Double Impact—each shares DNA with Widows while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Widows?
faq.answer: Widows (2018) is best described as Crime, Thriller, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Widows worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this crime lane.
